# DUI — Unstyled Lit Component Library

> Unstyled web components + composable themes. Components provide structure
> and behavior; themes provide aesthetics.

## Getting Started

Install: (Deno workspace package)
Import: import { DuiButton } from "@dui/components/button";
Register: applyTheme({ theme: defaultTheme, components: [DuiButton] });

## Styling Model

DUI uses a two-layer styling approach:

### Layer 1: CSS Variables
Each component exposes CSS custom properties for values that variants and sizes toggle.
Variables cascade from ancestor elements, so a parent can theme all descendant components.
The theme uses `background` (shorthand), so variables accept gradients and images, not just colors.

```css
/* Override button colors */
dui-button {
  --button-bg: linear-gradient(135deg, pink, purple);
  --button-fg: white;
}

/* Ancestor cascading — all buttons inside .card inherit this */
.card {
  --button-bg: var(--accent);
}
```

### Layer 2: ::part(root)
For any CSS property not covered by variables — filters, transforms, shadows, clip-paths,
backdrop-filter, blend modes — use ::part(root) on the component. Every component exposes
at least a `root` part. Complex components expose additional parts (e.g., `track`, `thumb`).

```css
/* Frosted glass */
dui-button::part(root) {
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(1.8);
}

/* Glow shadow */
dui-button::part(root) {
  box-shadow: 0 0 20px oklch(0.7 0.2 280 / 0.4);
}

/* Bouncy press */
dui-button::part(root):hover { transform: translateY(-1px); }
dui-button::part(root):active { transform: scale(0.97); }
```

Components include broad transition-property lists (background, box-shadow, filter,
transform, border-color) so ::part() overrides animate smoothly.

## Components

### Accordion
- Tag: `<dui-accordion>`
- Import: `@dui/components/accordion`
- Description: Vertically stacked sections with expandable/collapsible panels.
- Properties: value (string[] | undefined), defaultValue (string[], []), disabled (boolean, false), multiple (boolean, false), loopFocus (boolean, true), orientation ("vertical" | "horizontal", "vertical"), keepMounted (boolean, false)
- Events: value-change (string[])
- Slots: default (Container for dui-accordion-item children)

### Accordion Item
- Tag: `<dui-accordion-item>`
- Import: `@dui/components/accordion`
- Description: Individual collapsible item within an accordion.
- Properties: value (string, ""), disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: open-change ({ value: string; open: boolean })
- Slots: trigger (Header/trigger content), default (Panel content)
- CSS Parts: item (The item container), trigger (The expand/collapse button), indicator (The chevron indicator), panel (The collapsible panel wrapper), content (The panel content area)

### Alert Dialog
- Tag: `<dui-alert-dialog>`
- Import: `@dui/components/alert-dialog`
- Description: A modal dialog for critical actions. Does NOT close on backdrop click — requires explicit user action.
- Properties: open (boolean | undefined), defaultOpen (boolean, false)
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean })
- Slots: default (dui-alert-dialog-trigger and dui-alert-dialog-popup)

### Alert Dialog Trigger
- Tag: `<dui-alert-dialog-trigger>`
- Import: `@dui/components/alert-dialog`
- Description: Behavioral wrapper that opens the alert dialog on click.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content that triggers the alert dialog)

### Alert Dialog Popup
- Tag: `<dui-alert-dialog-popup>`
- Import: `@dui/components/alert-dialog`
- Description: The alert dialog overlay with backdrop, centered popup, focus trap, and animation.
- Properties: keepMounted (boolean, false), initialFocus (string | undefined), finalFocus (string | undefined)
- Events: none
- Slots: title (Alert dialog title (rendered as h2)), description (Alert dialog description (rendered as p)), default (Dialog content (actions, etc.))
- CSS Parts: backdrop (The overlay backdrop), popup (The dialog panel), title (The dialog title), description (The dialog description)

### Alert Dialog Close
- Tag: `<dui-alert-dialog-close>`
- Import: `@dui/components/alert-dialog`
- Description: A close button wrapper that closes the alert dialog on click.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content that closes the alert dialog)

### Breadcrumb
- Tag: `<dui-breadcrumb>`
- Import: `@dui/components/breadcrumb`
- Description: Navigation breadcrumb trail showing the current page location.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Breadcrumb items and separators)
- CSS Parts: root (The breadcrumb nav container)

### Breadcrumb Item
- Tag: `<dui-breadcrumb-item>`
- Import: `@dui/components/breadcrumb`
- Description: List item wrapper for a single breadcrumb entry.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (A breadcrumb link, page, or ellipsis)

### Breadcrumb Link
- Tag: `<dui-breadcrumb-link>`
- Import: `@dui/components/breadcrumb`
- Description: Styled wrapper for a clickable breadcrumb link.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (An <a> element for navigation)

### Breadcrumb Page
- Tag: `<dui-breadcrumb-page>`
- Import: `@dui/components/breadcrumb`
- Description: Current page indicator (not clickable).
- Events: none
- Slots: default (The current page label text)

### Breadcrumb Separator
- Tag: `<dui-breadcrumb-separator>`
- Import: `@dui/components/breadcrumb`
- Description: Visual separator between breadcrumb items. Defaults to "/".
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Custom separator content (defaults to "/"))

### Breadcrumb Ellipsis
- Tag: `<dui-breadcrumb-ellipsis>`
- Import: `@dui/components/breadcrumb`
- Description: Collapsed breadcrumb indicator. Defaults to "…".
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Custom ellipsis content (defaults to "…"))

### Checkbox
- Tag: `<dui-checkbox>`
- Import: `@dui/components/checkbox`
- Description: A checkbox input with optional indeterminate state and group support.
- Properties: checked (boolean | undefined), defaultChecked (boolean, false), indeterminate (boolean, false), disabled (boolean, false), readOnly (boolean, false), required (boolean, false), name (string | undefined), value (string | undefined), parent (boolean, false)
- Events: checked-change ({ checked: boolean; indeterminate: boolean })
- Slots: default (Label content)
- CSS Parts: root (The checkbox control), indicator (The check/indeterminate icon)

### Checkbox Group
- Tag: `<dui-checkbox-group>`
- Import: `@dui/components/checkbox`
- Description: Groups multiple checkboxes with shared state management.
- Properties: value (string[] | undefined), defaultValue (string[], []), allValues (string[], []), disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: value-change (string[])
- Slots: default (dui-checkbox children)

### Collapsible
- Tag: `<dui-collapsible>`
- Import: `@dui/components/collapsible`
- Description: A standalone disclosure widget with animated open/close transitions.
- Properties: open (boolean, false), defaultOpen (boolean, false), disabled (boolean, false), keepMounted (boolean, false)
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean })
- Slots: trigger (Trigger label content), default (Panel content)
- CSS Parts: trigger (The expand/collapse button), indicator (The chevron indicator), panel (The collapsible panel wrapper), content (The panel content area)

### Badge
- Tag: `<dui-badge>`
- Import: `@dui/components/badge`
- Description: An inline status indicator element.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Badge content)
- CSS Parts: root (The badge element)

### Button
- Tag: `<dui-button>`
- Import: `@dui/components/button`
- Description: An interactive button. Renders as a native <button> by default, or <a> when href is set.
- Properties: disabled (boolean, false), focusableWhenDisabled (boolean, false), type (string, "button"), href (string | undefined)
- Events: dui-navigate ({ href: string })
- Slots: default (Button label content)
- CSS Parts: root (The button or anchor element. Style via ::part(root) for full CSS expressiveness — filters, transforms, shadows, clip-paths, etc.)

### Combobox
- Tag: `<dui-combobox>`
- Import: `@dui/components/combobox`
- Description: Searchable dropdown with single and multi-select modes.
- Properties: options (SelectOption[], []), value (string, ""), values (Set<string>, new Set()), multiple (boolean, false), placeholder (string, "Search..."), disabled (boolean, false), name (string, "")
- Events: value-change ({ value: string; option: SelectOption }), values-change ({ value: string; selected: boolean; values: Set<string> })

### Dialog
- Tag: `<dui-dialog>`
- Import: `@dui/components/dialog`
- Description: A modal dialog with backdrop, focus trap, and open/close animation. Closes on backdrop click.
- Properties: open (boolean | undefined), defaultOpen (boolean, false)
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean })
- Slots: default (dui-dialog-trigger and dui-dialog-popup)

### Dialog Trigger
- Tag: `<dui-dialog-trigger>`
- Import: `@dui/components/dialog`
- Description: Behavioral wrapper that opens the dialog on click.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content that triggers the dialog)

### Dialog Popup
- Tag: `<dui-dialog-popup>`
- Import: `@dui/components/dialog`
- Description: The dialog overlay with backdrop, centered popup, focus trap, and animation.
- Properties: keepMounted (boolean, false), initialFocus (string | undefined), finalFocus (string | undefined), width (string | undefined)
- Events: none
- Slots: title (Dialog title (rendered as h2)), description (Dialog description (rendered as p)), default (Dialog content (actions, form fields, etc.))
- CSS Parts: backdrop (The overlay backdrop), popup (The dialog panel), title (The dialog title), description (The dialog description)

### Dialog Close
- Tag: `<dui-dialog-close>`
- Import: `@dui/components/dialog`
- Description: A close button wrapper that closes the dialog on click.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content that closes the dialog)

### Icon
- Tag: `<dui-icon>`
- Import: `@dui/components/icon`
- Description: Slot-based SVG icon container. Provide your own SVG via the default slot; inherits currentColor and sizes via --icon-size.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (SVG element to display)
- CSS Variables: --icon-size (Icon dimensions (default: 1em)), --icon-color (Icon color (default: currentColor))

### Menu
- Tag: `<dui-menu>`
- Import: `@dui/components/menu`
- Description: A popup menu triggered by a slotted element with keyboard navigation.
- Properties: popup-min-width (string, "var(--space-28)")
- Events: none
- Slots: trigger (The element that opens the menu on click), default (dui-menu-item children)
- CSS Parts: root (The menu popup panel)

### Menu Item
- Tag: `<dui-menu-item>`
- Import: `@dui/components/menu`
- Description: An item within a dui-menu.
- Properties: disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Item content)

### Popover
- Tag: `<dui-popover>`
- Import: `@dui/components/popover`
- Description: A popover with trigger, popup, and close sub-components.
- Properties: open (boolean, false), defaultOpen (boolean, false), side ("top" | "bottom", "bottom"), sideOffset (number, 8)
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean })
- Slots: default (dui-popover-trigger and dui-popover-popup)

### Popover Trigger
- Tag: `<dui-popover-trigger>`
- Import: `@dui/components/popover`
- Description: Click-to-toggle trigger for the popover.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content that triggers the popover)

### Popover Popup
- Tag: `<dui-popover-popup>`
- Import: `@dui/components/popover`
- Description: The popover popup content container.
- Properties: showArrow (boolean, true), closeOnClick (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Popover content)

### Popover Close
- Tag: `<dui-popover-close>`
- Import: `@dui/components/popover`
- Description: A close button wrapper for the popover.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content that closes the popover)

### Scroll Area
- Tag: `<dui-scroll-area>`
- Import: `@dui/components/scroll-area`
- Description: Custom scrollbar overlay with fade support.
- Properties: orientation (string, "vertical"), fade (boolean, false), maxHeight (string | undefined)
- Events: scrolled-to-bottom, scrolled-from-bottom
- Slots: default (Scrollable content)
- CSS Variables: --scroll-area-max-height (Max-height constraint), --scroll-area-thumb-color (Scrollbar thumb color), --scroll-fade-color (Fade overlay color)
- CSS Parts: viewport (The scrollable viewport), scrollbar-vertical (Vertical scrollbar track), scrollbar-horizontal (Horizontal scrollbar track), thumb-vertical (Vertical scrollbar thumb), thumb-horizontal (Horizontal scrollbar thumb)

### Slider
- Tag: `<dui-slider>`
- Import: `@dui/components/slider`
- Description: A slider for selecting numeric values within a range. Supports a field variant with value readout, label, unit suffix, and gradient track backgrounds.
- Properties: value (number, 0), min (number, 0), max (number, 100), step (number, 1), disabled (boolean, false), name (string, ""), label (string, ""), unit (string, ""), precision (number | undefined)
- Events: value-change ({ value: number }), value-committed ({ value: number })
- CSS Parts: root (The slider container), track (The track background), indicator (The filled portion of the track), thumb (The draggable thumb), label (Label text element), readout (Value readout overlaid on the track), unit (Unit suffix element)

### Spinner
- Tag: `<dui-spinner>`
- Import: `@dui/components/spinner`
- Description: A loading indicator with multiple animation variants.
- Properties: variant ("pulse" | "lucide-loader" | "lucide-loader-circle", "pulse")
- Events: none

### Switch
- Tag: `<dui-switch>`
- Import: `@dui/components/switch`
- Description: A toggle switch with checked, disabled, and read-only states.
- Properties: checked (boolean | undefined), defaultChecked (boolean, false), disabled (boolean, false), readOnly (boolean, false), required (boolean, false), name (string | undefined), value (string, "on")
- Events: checked-change ({ checked: boolean })
- Slots: default (Label content)
- CSS Variables: --switch-thumb-offset (Thumb inset offset), --switch-checked-offset (Checked state thumb offset)
- CSS Parts: root (The switch track), thumb (The switch thumb)

### Tabs
- Tag: `<dui-tabs>`
- Import: `@dui/components/tabs`
- Description: A tabbed interface with animated indicator and keyboard navigation.
- Properties: value (string | undefined), defaultValue (string | undefined), orientation ("horizontal" | "vertical", "horizontal"), controls ("header" | "footer", "header")
- Events: value-change (string)
- Slots: default (Tab list and tab panels)

### Tabs List
- Tag: `<dui-tabs-list>`
- Import: `@dui/components/tabs`
- Description: Container for tab triggers. Manages indicator positioning.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (dui-tab elements and optional dui-tabs-indicator)
- CSS Parts: list (The tab list container)

### Tab
- Tag: `<dui-tab>`
- Import: `@dui/components/tabs`
- Description: Individual tab trigger button.
- Properties: value (string, ""), disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Tab label content)
- CSS Parts: tab (The tab trigger button)

### Tabs Panel
- Tag: `<dui-tabs-panel>`
- Import: `@dui/components/tabs`
- Description: Content panel for a tab. Shown when the matching tab is active.
- Properties: value (string, ""), keepMounted (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Panel content)
- CSS Parts: panel (The tab panel content area)

### Tabs Indicator
- Tag: `<dui-tabs-indicator>`
- Import: `@dui/components/tabs`
- Description: Animated background indicator for the active tab.
- Events: none

### Textarea
- Tag: `<dui-textarea>`
- Import: `@dui/components/textarea`
- Description: A multi-line text input with resize modes including auto-grow.
- Properties: value (string, ""), placeholder (string, ""), disabled (boolean, false), required (boolean, false), readonly (boolean, false), rows (number | undefined), minLength (number | undefined), maxLength (number | undefined), name (string, ""), resize ("none" | "vertical" | "horizontal" | "both" | "auto", "vertical"), maxHeight (string | undefined)
- Events: textarea-change ({ value: string })
- CSS Parts: textarea (The native textarea element)

### Toolbar
- Tag: `<dui-toolbar>`
- Import: `@dui/components/toolbar`
- Description: A 3-column toolbar layout with left, center, and right slots. CSS grid keeps the center slot centered regardless of left/right content width.
- Properties: inset (boolean, false), hasButtonLeft (boolean, false), hasButtonRight (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: left (Content aligned to the start), center (Content centered in the toolbar), right (Content aligned to the end)
- CSS Parts: root (The toolbar container), left (Left-aligned slot container), center (Center-aligned slot container), right (Right-aligned slot container)

### Trunc
- Tag: `<dui-trunc>`
- Import: `@dui/components/trunc`
- Description: Text truncation with ellipsis. Single-line by default, or multi-line clamping with max-lines.
- Properties: maxWidth (string, "20rem"), maxLines (number | undefined)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Text content to truncate)

### Avatar
- Tag: `<dui-avatar>`
- Import: `@dui/components/avatar`
- Description: Image display with fallback content and loading state management.
- Properties: src (string | undefined), alt (string, ""), size (string | undefined), fallbackDelay (number | undefined)
- Events: loading-status-change ({ status: ImageStatus })
- Slots: default (Fallback content (e.g. initials or icon))
- CSS Variables: --avatar-size (Avatar dimensions (width and height))
- CSS Parts: root (The avatar container), image (The avatar image element), fallback (The fallback content (initials/icon))

### Portal
- Tag: `<dui-portal>`
- Import: `@dui/components/portal`
- Description: Teleports light DOM children to a target container elsewhere in the document.
- Properties: target (string, "body"), targetRoot ("shadow" | "document", "document"), targetElement (HTMLElement | undefined)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content to teleport)

### Tooltip
- Tag: `<dui-tooltip>`
- Import: `@dui/components/tooltip`
- Description: A tooltip with hover/focus trigger and configurable delay.
- Properties: open (boolean, false), defaultOpen (boolean, false), side ("top" | "bottom", "top"), sideOffset (number, 6), delay (number, 500), closeDelay (number, 0), disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean })
- Slots: default (dui-tooltip-trigger and dui-tooltip-popup)

### Tooltip Trigger
- Tag: `<dui-tooltip-trigger>`
- Import: `@dui/components/tooltip`
- Description: The element that triggers the tooltip on hover/focus.
- Properties: disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content that triggers the tooltip)

### Tooltip Popup
- Tag: `<dui-tooltip-popup>`
- Import: `@dui/components/tooltip`
- Description: The tooltip popup content container.
- Properties: showArrow (boolean, true)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Tooltip content)

### Input
- Tag: `<dui-input>`
- Import: `@dui/components/input`
- Description: A native input element that integrates with dui-field for accessible labeling and validation.
- Properties: type (string, "text"), value (string, ""), placeholder (string, ""), disabled (boolean, false), required (boolean, false), readonly (boolean, false), minLength (number | undefined), maxLength (number | undefined), pattern (string | undefined), name (string, ""), autocomplete (string | undefined), autofocus (boolean, false)
- Events: input-change ({ value: string })
- CSS Parts: input (The native input element)

### Radio Group
- Tag: `<dui-radio-group>`
- Import: `@dui/components/radio`
- Description: Groups multiple radio buttons with shared state. Only one radio can be selected at a time.
- Properties: name (string | undefined), value (string | undefined), defaultValue (string | undefined), disabled (boolean, false), readOnly (boolean, false), required (boolean, false)
- Events: value-change ({ value: string })
- Slots: default (dui-radio children)

### Radio
- Tag: `<dui-radio>`
- Import: `@dui/components/radio`
- Description: A radio button input. Must be used within a dui-radio-group.
- Properties: value (string, ""), disabled (boolean, false), readOnly (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Label content)
- CSS Variables: --radio-size (Size of the radio button)
- CSS Parts: root (The radio control), dot (The selected-state dot)

### Dropzone
- Tag: `<dui-dropzone>`
- Import: `@dui/components/dropzone`
- Description: A drag-and-drop file upload area with validation for file type, size, and count.
- Properties: accept (string | undefined), multiple (boolean, false), disabled (boolean, false), maxFiles (number, Infinity), maxSize (number, Infinity), minSize (number, 0), autoFocus (boolean, false), noStyle (boolean, false)
- Events: drop ({ acceptedFiles: File[]; rejectedFiles: RejectedFile[] }), drop-accepted ({ acceptedFiles: File[] }), drop-rejected ({ rejectedFiles: RejectedFile[] }), dropzone-error ({ error: unknown; code: string })
- Slots: default (Custom content for the dropzone area)
- CSS Parts: root (The drop target area)

### Select
- Tag: `<dui-select>`
- Import: `@dui/components/select`
- Description: A dropdown select for choosing from a list of predefined options.
- Properties: options (SelectOption[], []), value (string, ""), placeholder (string, "Select..."), disabled (boolean, false), align-item-to-trigger (boolean, true), name (string, "")
- Events: value-change ({ value: string; option: SelectOption })
- CSS Parts: trigger (The select trigger button), value (The selected value display)

### Preview Card
- Tag: `<dui-preview-card>`
- Import: `@dui/components/preview-card`
- Description: A hover card that shows rich preview content. Stays open when cursor moves to the popup.
- Properties: open (boolean, false), defaultOpen (boolean, false), side ("top" | "bottom", "top"), sideOffset (number, 8), delay (number, 400), closeDelay (number, 300)
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean })
- Slots: default (dui-preview-card-trigger and dui-preview-card-popup)

### Preview Card Trigger
- Tag: `<dui-preview-card-trigger>`
- Import: `@dui/components/preview-card`
- Description: The element that triggers the preview card on hover/focus.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Content that triggers the preview card (e.g. a link))

### Preview Card Popup
- Tag: `<dui-preview-card-popup>`
- Import: `@dui/components/preview-card`
- Description: The preview card popup content container. Stays open on hover.
- Properties: showArrow (boolean, true)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Preview card content)

### Data Table
- Tag: `<dui-data-table>`
- Import: `@dui/components/data-table`
- Description: A sortable, paginated data table with column definitions and custom cell renderers.
- Properties: columns (ColumnDef<T>[], []), data (T[], []), pageSize (number, 10), rowKey (((row: T) => string) | undefined), emptyText (string, "No results.")
- Events: sort-change (SortState | null), page-change (PageState)
- CSS Parts: root (The outer data table container), table-window (The scrollable table wrapper), table (The native table element), pagination (The pagination controls)

### Command
- Tag: `<dui-command>`
- Import: `@dui/components/command`
- Description: A searchable command palette with keyboard navigation, filtering, and grouped items.
- Properties: loop (boolean, false), shouldFilter (boolean, true), value (string | undefined), filter (FilterFn | undefined)
- Events: select (string), search-change (string), escape
- Slots: default (Command input, list, groups, and items)

### Command Input
- Tag: `<dui-command-input>`
- Import: `@dui/components/command`
- Description: Search input for the command palette.
- Properties: placeholder (string, "Search...")
- Events: none

### Command List
- Tag: `<dui-command-list>`
- Import: `@dui/components/command`
- Description: Scrollable list container for command items and groups.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Command groups, items, separators, and empty state)

### Command Group
- Tag: `<dui-command-group>`
- Import: `@dui/components/command`
- Description: Groups related command items with an optional heading. Hides when no items match the search.
- Properties: heading (string, "")
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Command items)

### Command Item
- Tag: `<dui-command-item>`
- Import: `@dui/components/command`
- Description: A selectable item within a command group or list.
- Properties: value (string, ""), keywords (string[], []), disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Item content)

### Command Empty
- Tag: `<dui-command-empty>`
- Import: `@dui/components/command`
- Description: Shown when no command items match the search query.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Empty state content)

### Command Separator
- Tag: `<dui-command-separator>`
- Import: `@dui/components/command`
- Description: A visual separator between command groups or items.
- Events: none

### Command Shortcut
- Tag: `<dui-command-shortcut>`
- Import: `@dui/components/command`
- Description: Displays a keyboard shortcut hint within a command item.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Shortcut text (e.g. ⌘K))

### Sidebar
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-provider>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Root state manager for the sidebar. Manages open/close state, mobile detection, and provides context.
- Properties: open (boolean | undefined), defaultOpen (boolean, true), side ("left" | "right", "left"), variant ("sidebar" | "floating" | "inset", "sidebar"), collapsible ("offcanvas" | "icon" | "none", "offcanvas")
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean })
- Slots: default (Sidebar and content areas)

### Sidebar Panel
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: The sidebar panel itself. Renders desktop or mobile layout based on viewport.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Sidebar content (header, content, footer))

### Sidebar Trigger
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-trigger>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Toggle button for the sidebar.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Override the default icon)

### Sidebar Content
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-content>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Scrollable content section of the sidebar.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Groups, menus, etc.)

### Sidebar Header
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-header>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Header section at the top of the sidebar.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Header content)

### Sidebar Footer
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-footer>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Footer section at the bottom of the sidebar.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Footer content)

### Sidebar Group
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-group>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Section container within the sidebar for grouping related items.
- Events: none
- Slots: label (Group label (use dui-sidebar-group-label)), default (Group content)

### Sidebar Group Label
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-group-label>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Heading for a sidebar group. Hides in icon-collapsed mode.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Label text)

### Sidebar Menu
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-menu>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Navigation menu container within a sidebar group.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Menu items)

### Sidebar Menu Item
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-menu-item>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Individual item within a sidebar menu.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Menu button or content)

### Sidebar Menu Button
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-menu-button>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Interactive button or link within a sidebar menu. Renders as anchor when href is set.
- Properties: active (boolean, false), disabled (boolean, false), tooltip (string, ""), href (string | undefined)
- Events: spa-navigate ({ href: string })
- Slots: icon (Icon slot, shown before the label), default (Label text), suffix (Suffix slot, shown after the label)

### Sidebar Separator
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-separator>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: A visual separator within the sidebar.
- Events: none

### Sidebar Inset
- Tag: `<dui-sidebar-inset>`
- Import: `@dui/components/sidebar`
- Description: Main content area that adjusts its width based on the sidebar state.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Main content)

### Split Button
- Tag: `<dui-split-button>`
- Import: `@dui/components/split-button`
- Description: A button with an attached dropdown menu trigger. The action zone (left) performs a primary action. The menu trigger (right) opens a dropdown of dui-menu-item children for secondary actions.
- Properties: popup-min-width (string, "var(--space-28)"), disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: dui-action ({})
- Slots: default (Action button label content), icon (Custom icon for the dropdown trigger (defaults to chevron-down)), menu (dui-menu-item elements for the dropdown)
- CSS Parts: root (The outer container wrapping both zones), action (The left action button), divider (The vertical separator between zones), trigger (The right dropdown trigger button)

### Separator
- Tag: `<dui-separator>`
- Import: `@dui/components/separator`
- Description: A visual divider between content sections. Supports horizontal and vertical orientation.
- Properties: orientation ("horizontal" | "vertical", "horizontal")
- Events: none
- CSS Parts: root (The separator element)

### Progress
- Tag: `<dui-progress>`
- Import: `@dui/components/progress`
- Description: A progress bar indicating completion status. Supports determinate and indeterminate states.
- Properties: value (number | null, null), min (number, 0), max (number, 100)
- Events: none
- CSS Variables: --progress-value (Computed progress percentage (set internally))
- CSS Parts: root (The progress container), track (The track background), indicator (The filled indicator bar)

### Toggle
- Tag: `<dui-toggle>`
- Import: `@dui/components/toggle`
- Description: A two-state toggle button. Works standalone or inside a toggle group.
- Properties: pressed (boolean | undefined), defaultPressed (boolean, false), disabled (boolean, false), value (string | undefined)
- Events: pressed-change ({ pressed: boolean })
- Slots: default (Toggle content (text and/or icons)), icon (Optional leading icon)
- CSS Variables: --toggle-gap (Gap between icon and label)
- CSS Parts: root (The toggle button)

### Toggle Group
- Tag: `<dui-toggle-group>`
- Import: `@dui/components/toggle`
- Description: Groups toggle buttons with shared single or multi selection state.
- Properties: value (string[] | undefined), defaultValue (string[], []), type ("single" | "multiple", "single"), orientation ("horizontal" | "vertical", "horizontal"), disabled (boolean, false), loop (boolean, true)
- Events: value-change ({ value: string[] })
- Slots: default (dui-toggle children)
- CSS Parts: root (The toggle group container)

### Number Field
- Tag: `<dui-number-field>`
- Import: `@dui/components/number-field`
- Description: A numeric input with optional label, icon, unit suffix, drag-to-scrub, and precision formatting. For simple +/- stepping, use dui-stepper.
- Properties: value (number | undefined), defaultValue (number | undefined), min (number | undefined), max (number | undefined), step (number, 1), largeStep (number, 10), disabled (boolean, false), readOnly (boolean, false), required (boolean, false), name (string | undefined), label (string, ""), labelPosition (string, ""), iconPosition (string, ""), unit (string, ""), precision (number | undefined), scrubLabel (boolean, false), scrubValue (boolean, false), scrubField (boolean, false), clickLabel (boolean, false), clickValue (boolean, false), clickField (boolean, false)
- Events: value-change ({ value: number }), value-committed ({ value: number })
- Slots: icon (Icon content (SVG, dui-icon, etc.), positioned by icon-position)
- CSS Parts: root (The outer container (receives data-dragging, data-disabled, data-readonly)), label (Label text element), icon (Icon slot wrapper), input (The text input element), unit (Unit suffix element)

### Stepper
- Tag: `<dui-stepper>`
- Import: `@dui/components/stepper`
- Description: A simple numeric input with increment/decrement buttons. For labels, icons, scrubbing, and units, use dui-number-field.
- Properties: value (number | undefined), defaultValue (number | undefined), min (number | undefined), max (number | undefined), step (number, 1), largeStep (number, 10), disabled (boolean, false), readOnly (boolean, false), required (boolean, false), name (string | undefined)
- Events: value-change ({ value: number }), value-committed ({ value: number })
- Slots: decrement (Custom decrement button content), increment (Custom increment button content)
- CSS Parts: root (The outer container), input (The numeric input element), decrement (The decrement button), increment (The increment button)

### Menubar
- Tag: `<dui-menubar>`
- Import: `@dui/components/menubar`
- Description: A horizontal bar of menus with coordinated open/close behavior.
- Properties: loop (boolean, true), orientation ("horizontal" | "vertical", "horizontal")
- Events: none
- Slots: default (dui-menu children)
- CSS Parts: root (The menubar container)

### Calendar
- Tag: `<dui-calendar>`
- Import: `@dui/components/calendar`
- Description: A date picker calendar grid with keyboard navigation and locale support.
- Properties: value (string | undefined), defaultValue (string | undefined), min (string | undefined), max (string | undefined), locale (string, "en-US"), disabled (boolean, false), readOnly (boolean, false)
- Events: value-change ({ value: string })
- Slots: prev (Custom previous month button content), next (Custom next month button content)
- CSS Parts: root (The calendar container), header (The month/year header row), heading (The month/year label), prev (Previous month button), next (Next month button), grid (The date grid), weekday (Weekday header cells), day (Individual day buttons)

### Card
- Tag: `<dui-card>`
- Import: `@dui/components/card`
- Description: A container for grouped content with header, body, and footer sections. Uses flex-column + gap for vertical rhythm.
- Properties: size ("" | "sm", "")
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Main card content (body).), title (Card heading text.), description (Helper text below the title.), action (Top-right header action (button, badge, etc.).), footer (Footer content (buttons, links, etc.).)
- CSS Parts: root (The outer card container.), header (The header section (title + description + action).), header-text (Vertical stack holding title and description slots.), action (Zero-height wrapper around the action slot (reserves width, not height).), content (Wrapper around the default slot.), footer (The footer section.)

### Card Grid
- Tag: `<dui-card-grid>`
- Import: `@dui/components/card-grid`
- Description: A responsive grid layout for cards and panels. Distributes children into equal-width columns that collapse at narrow container widths.
- Properties: columns (string, "3")
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Grid children (cards, panels, or any block content))
- CSS Parts: root (The grid container element)

### Map
- Tag: `<dui-map>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Root map component wrapping MapLibre GL JS. Initializes the map, provides context to children, auto-detects dark/light theme.
- Properties: center ([number, number], [0, 0]), zoom (number, 1), bearing (number, 0), pitch (number, 0), theme ("light" | "dark" | undefined), styleLight (string | undefined), styleDark (string | undefined), loading (boolean, false), noWorldCopies (boolean, false), controlled (boolean, false), minZoom (number, 0), maxZoom (number, 22), maxBounds ([[number, number], [number, number]] | undefined), bounds ([[number, number], [number, number]] | undefined), boundsPadding (number, 50)
- Events: dui-map-viewport-change (MapViewport), dui-map-load, dui-map-click (MapClickDetail), dui-map-dblclick (MapClickDetail), dui-map-contextmenu (MapClickDetail)
- Slots: default (Map overlay content (controls, markers, popups, routes))
- CSS Parts: container (The map container div), loader (The loading indicator overlay)

### MapControls
- Tag: `<dui-map-controls>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Zoom, compass, locate, and fullscreen map controls.
- Properties: position ("top-left" | "top-right" | "bottom-left" | "bottom-right", "bottom-right"), showZoom (boolean, true), showCompass (boolean, false), showLocate (boolean, false), showFullscreen (boolean, false)
- Events: dui-map-locate ({ longitude: number; latitude: number })
- CSS Parts: root (The outer controls wrapper), group (A control group container), control-button (Individual control buttons)

### MapMarker
- Tag: `<dui-map-marker>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Places a marker at a coordinate on the map.
- Properties: longitude (number, 0), latitude (number, 0), draggable (boolean, false), rotation (number, 0), offset ([number, number], [0, 0])
- Events: dui-marker-dragstart ({ lng: number; lat: number }), dui-marker-drag ({ lng: number; lat: number }), dui-marker-dragend ({ lng: number; lat: number })
- Slots: default (Marker sub-components)

### MapMarkerContent
- Tag: `<dui-map-marker-content>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Custom marker DOM content. Renders slotted content into the marker element.
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Custom marker content)
- CSS Parts: root (Wrapper div inside the marker element)

### MapMarkerPopup
- Tag: `<dui-map-marker-popup>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Click-to-open popup on a marker.
- Properties: popupOffset (number, 16), closeButton (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Popup content)
- CSS Parts: popup (The popup content wrapper)

### MapMarkerTooltip
- Tag: `<dui-map-marker-tooltip>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Hover tooltip on a marker.
- Properties: tooltipOffset (number, 16)
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Tooltip content)
- CSS Parts: tooltip (The tooltip content wrapper)

### MapMarkerLabel
- Tag: `<dui-map-marker-label>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Static label above or below a marker.
- Properties: position ("top" | "bottom", "top")
- Events: none
- Slots: default (Label text content)
- CSS Parts: label (The label element)

### MapPopup
- Tag: `<dui-map-popup>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Standalone popup at coordinates on the map.
- Properties: longitude (number, 0), latitude (number, 0), popupOffset (number, 16), closeButton (boolean, false)
- Events: dui-map-popup-close
- Slots: default (Popup content)
- CSS Parts: popup (The popup content wrapper)

### MapRoute
- Tag: `<dui-map-route>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: GeoJSON LineString route layer on the map.
- Properties: routeId (string), coordinates ([number, number][], []), color (string, "#4285F4"), width (number, 3), opacity (number, 0.8), dashArray ([number, number] | undefined), interactive (boolean, true)
- Events: dui-route-click

### MapRegion
- Tag: `<dui-map-region>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: GeoJSON polygon fill layer for regional overlays on the map.
- Properties: regionId (string), data (string | GeoJSON.Feature | GeoJSON.FeatureCollection), fillColor (string, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)"), fillOpacity (number, 1), strokeColor (string, "#3b82f6"), strokeWidth (number, 2), strokeOpacity (number, 1), interactive (boolean, true)
- Events: dui-region-click

### MapClusterLayer
- Tag: `<dui-map-cluster-layer>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Clustered point visualization on the map.
- Properties: data (string | GeoJSON.FeatureCollection), clusterMaxZoom (number, 14), clusterRadius (number, 50), clusterColors ([string, string, string], ["#22c55e", "#eab308", "#ef4444"]), clusterThresholds ([number, number], [100, 750]), pointColor (string, "#3b82f6")
- Events: dui-cluster-point-click ({ feature, coordinates }), dui-cluster-click ({ clusterId, coordinates, pointCount })

### MapHeatmap
- Tag: `<dui-map-heatmap>`
- Import: `@dui/map`
- Description: Heatmap density visualization on the map.
- Properties: data (string | GeoJSON.FeatureCollection), radius (number, 20), intensity (number, 1), opacity (number, 0.8), weight (string, ""), maxZoom (number, 9), showPoints (boolean, true), pointColor (string, "#3b82f6"), colorRamp (string[]), heatmapId (string)
- Events: none

### Chart
- Tag: `<dui-chart>`
- Import: `@dui/chart`
- Description: Chart component wrapping Observable Plot. Pass a Plot spec object to render SVG charts with automatic theming and responsive sizing.
- Properties: spec (PlotOptions), variant (string, ""), tooltip (boolean, true), responsive (boolean, true)
- Events: dui-chart-render ({ element: SVGElement | HTMLElement }), dui-chart-input ({ value: unknown })
- CSS Variables: --chart-color-1 (Series color 1), --chart-color-2 (Series color 2), --chart-color-3 (Series color 3), --chart-color-4 (Series color 4), --chart-color-5 (Series color 5), --chart-color-6 (Series color 6), --chart-color-7 (Series color 7), --chart-color-8 (Series color 8), --chart-bg (Plot background), --chart-grid-color (Grid line color), --chart-axis-color (Axis text/line color), --chart-font-family (Chart text font), --chart-font-size (Axis/tick label size), --chart-tooltip-bg (Tooltip background), --chart-tooltip-color (Tooltip text color), --chart-tooltip-border (Tooltip border color), --chart-tooltip-radius (Tooltip corner radius), --chart-tooltip-padding (Tooltip padding), --chart-tooltip-font-size (Tooltip font size), --chart-tooltip-line-height (Tooltip line height)
- CSS Parts: root (The chart container div), tooltip (The HTML tooltip overlay)

### Field
- Tag: `<dui-field>`
- Import: `@dui/components/field`
- Description: Slot-based form field wrapper. Provides label, description, and error slots with automatic ARIA wiring and field state tracking.
- Properties: disabled (boolean, false), invalid (boolean, false), orientation ("vertical" | "horizontal", "vertical")
- Events: none
- Slots: label (Label text (e.g. <span slot="label">Email</span>)), default (The form control), description (Help text (e.g. <span slot="description">…</span>)), error (Error message (e.g. <span slot="error">Required</span>))
- CSS Parts: root (The field container element), label (The label wrapper), description (The description wrapper), error (The error wrapper (hidden unless invalid))

### Fieldset
- Tag: `<dui-fieldset>`
- Import: `@dui/components/fieldset`
- Description: Semantic grouping for related form fields using a native fieldset element.
- Properties: disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: none
- Slots: legend (Legend text (e.g. <span slot="legend">Personal Info</span>)), default (Field children)
- CSS Parts: root (The native fieldset element), legend (The native legend element)
